summary: Frontend testing of Product Variant System - All 15 features tested successfully. Healthmug-inspired product detail page with variants, sticky sidebar, breadcrumbs, URL updates for SEO, and cart integration all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Product variant system well implemented with Healthmug-style UI
Sticky sidebar with Buy Now/Add to Cart buttons works correctly
URL updates with variant slug for SEO (e.g., /products/{id}/30ml, /products/{id}/200-ch)
Price per 100ml calculation displays correctly on variant buttons
Stock warning 'Only X left at this price' displays for low stock products (stock <= 5)
seed_data_creation: 27 variants seeded for 3 products (done by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Variant System fully functional. HealthmugProductDetail.js implements variant selection, price updates, URL slug updates, sticky sidebar. Cart integration works with variants. Test user can add items to cart and wishlist.

features_tested.4_potency_variants: PASS - 6 CH, 12 CH, 30 CH, 200 CH displayed initially
features_tested.5_plus_more_button: PASS - '+2 more' expands to show 1M and 10M potencies
features_tested.6_variant_price_update: PASS - Clicking variant updates main price display
features_tested.7_sidebar_price_update: PASS - Sidebar shows synchronized price with variant selection
features_tested.8_stock_warning: PASS - 'Only 3 left at this price' displayed for low stock product
features_tested.9_wishlist_button: PASS - Heart button visible, adds to wishlist with toast confirmation
features_tested.10_buy_now_button: PASS - Adds to cart and navigates to cart page
features_tested.11_add_to_cart_button: PASS - Adds item with selected variant, shows success toast
features_tested.12_pincode_input: PASS - Input field works, shows delivery info on check
features_tested.13_seven_days_return: PASS - '7 days easy return' section displayed in sidebar
features_tested.14_product_specifications: PASS - Section displays with Brand, Category, Origin, Pack Size
features_tested.15_brand_view_all: PASS - 'View All' link navigates to products filtered by brand
features_tested.16_sticky_sidebar: PASS - Sidebar remains visible while scrolling
